resources.string: Play by feeling, era, or energy
Listen to songs to generate your quick picks
Library songs will show up here
Library artists will show up here
Library albums will show up here
Your playlists will show up here
Do you really want to remove all \"%s\" playlist songs from the Downloaded Songs storage?
Do you really want to delete the playlist \"%s\"?
Requesting host to change the song\u2026
Song change not applied. Please try again.
The song is already in your playlist
%d songs are already in your playlist
Apply a random color palette every time the app starts
Use the device font instead of the app font
Enable the new library design (may be unstable)
Animate album artwork while playing (Powered by BetterLyrics)
Unavailable with the Immersive player style
Toggle visibility of button 1 in Discord Rich Presence
Toggle visibility of button 2 in Discord Rich Presence
Disable blur effects throughout the app
Disable most app animations. Recommended for low-end devices
Confirm playback in YouTube Music, then return to Echo Music.
Refresh your YouTube Music login, then return to Echo Music.
DNS over HTTPS only works if your country blocks YouTube. If YouTube actively blocks your region, consider using a Proxy or VPN.
Please only use Proxies that you are sure are safe. Free Proxies are convenient but not always safe, so be careful. You have been warned, and we are not responsible for your security.
Use DNS over HTTPS (DoH) to resolve hostnames
Use your direct IP for stream playback to avoid IP mismatch
When enabled, the app will prefer lower-quality streams on metered networks
Restore your last queue when the app starts
Keep shuffle enabled when you start a new song
Automatically add more songs when the end of the queue is reached. Disabled when repeat mode is active
Let supported devices play audio using low-power hardware decoding. Some audio processing features are disabled.
Automatically pause music when muted and resume when unmuted
Auto skip to next song when error occurs
Prevents the system from interrupting music by holding a CPU wake lock
Automatically resume playback when a Bluetooth audio device connects
Symbols used to split multiple artists
Download songs through an external app by package name
Package name of the external downloader app (e.g. com.deniscerri.ytdl)
External downloader app is not installed
No external downloader configured. Set one in Settings → Player.
Apply a profile or save your current settings
Smart trimmer dynamically manages the image cache and song cache, pruning old entries to save disk space.
Downloads, playback, and artwork caches update live.
Available offline until you remove them.
Cache is turned off and cleared automatically.
Canvas is limited by item count instead of disk size.
Enable image or song cache before using Smart Trimmer.
Are you sure you want to clear all listen history?
Are you sure you want to clear all search history?
This can influence what content you see and for example shows premium-only albums if you are logged in with a Premium account
When this option is on, screenshots and the app\'s view in Recents are disabled.
This app uses Google Analytics for anonymous usage analytics.

Echo Music uses the KizzyRPC library to set your Discord account\'s status. This involves using the Discord Gateway connection, which may be considered a violation of Discord\'s TOS. However, there are no known cases of user accounts being suspended for this reason. Use at your own risk. Echo Music will only extract your token, and everything else is stored locally.
Enable submitting now-playing and finished listens to ListenBrainz
Translate selected fields before sending to Discord RPC
If enabled, Rich Presence will remain visible while paused with a pause icon. If disabled, RPC will disappear when paused.
When enabled, a small circular image is shown in the Rich Presence preview and sent to Discord if available
Are you sure you want to log out of Discord?.
Advanced or experimental Discord options (moved to separate screen)
Display real-time playback statistics (codec, bitrate, buffer)
Show current audio codec information on the player
Logs will appear here when available
Nightly builds and recent development commits
You are on the latest available release
Get notified when a new stable version is released
Choose between tested releases and development snapshots.
Nightly builds track the newest development commits and may include unfinished changes.
Allow Echo Music to work best
We use a few permissions to play and manage your music reliably. You can change these anytime in system settings.
Required to read your downloaded and local audio files for playback.
Used to show playback controls and keep music running in the background.
All required permissions are allowed. You are ready to start.
Please allow all required permissions to continue.
Paste a join link or code
Online sessions aren\'t available in this build
Server error, please try again later
Music Together lets multiple devices share a live session with a synced queue and playback.
Tap Start session, then share the session link. Keep Echo Music open in the background while hosting.
Open the shared link, or enter code and tap Join. Your queue and playback will follow the host.
Hosts can decide whether guests can add songs, control playback, or require approval to join.
Generate and manage web client PO tokens
Enable PO token generation for web-based player clients
Use visitor data for token generation. Requires cookies to be disabled.
Cookies must be disabled to use visitor data
Open and sign in on youtube.com/account before extracting
No visitor data available. Tokens cannot be generated.
Sign in here with the same Google account that you already use for YouTube Music inside Echo Music before generating a PO token.
If this WebView uses a different account, the generated token will not work correctly.
Use the matching account, finish the sign-in flow, then open youtube.com/account and generate the token from that page.
